ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the student first registered with the institution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the student record was last updated */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student's emergency contact */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course */,
  "course_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "course_description_url" TEXT /* URL to the course description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (if applicable) */,
  "enrollment_status_date" TEXT /* Date the enrollment status was last updated */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment for which the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional payment method details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the instructor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired */,
  "instructor_title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., lecture slides, assignments, readings) */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_size" INTEGER /* Size of the material in bytes */,
  "material_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
